entity.summary: Polkadot appchain and decentralized trading protocol combining multiple AMM designs, including Omnipool, Stablepools, and Isolated Pools, with manual swaps, automated trading, OTC orders, and liquidity services.
entity.notes: HEI models Hydration and the Hydration DEX source row as one exchange entity. Current first-party documentation describes Hydration as a Polkadot appchain whose trading pillar combines Omnipool, Stablepools, and Isolated Pools, alongside manual trades, automated DCA, OTC orders, and liquidity provision.

evidence.title: Hydration official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party site exposes live trade, swap, automated trading, OTC, and liquidity functions and links the active Hydration application.

evidence.title: What is Hydration?
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes Hydration as a Polkadot L1 appchain and details its trading pillar across Omnipool, Stablepools, and Isolated Pools.

evidence.title: Hydration Trade documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party trade documentation provides manual trade and automated-trading guides, supporting active exchange classification.
